scripts.build: cp .yarnrc-lambda.yml .yarnrc.yml && mkdir -p data && cp ../coffee.chealt.com/data/*.json data && yarn workspaces focus --production && zip -rq package.zip . -x .yarnrc.yml .yarnrc-lambda.yml && rm .yarnrc.yml && rm -rf data
scripts.test: rm -rf data && mkdir data && cp ../coffee.chealt.com/data/*.json data && node --env-file=../coffee-admin/.env test.js
